user.title: Connection type
user.description: Choose the mode for the Alby Hub connection. Warning: this is beta software and may cause financial loss under some conditions. Use only small test amounts. You are responsible for safe usage.

cloud.title: Cloud mode (NWC)
cloud.description: Paste the NWC connection string from Alby Hub. To enable the Nostr bot without an existing key pair, leave 'Bot private key' empty — the next step will generate a key pair and display it to you. For own NPUB and local relay options, see: https://github.com/northpower25/ha-btc-alby-hub-integration/tree/HEAD/docs/handbook.en.md and https://github.com/northpower25/ha-btc-alby-hub-addon. Warning: beta software can fail or behave unexpectedly and could lead to financial loss. Do not test with large amounts.

data.lightning_address: Lightning address (e.g. user@getalby.com) – optional manual fallback
data.network_api_base: Network API base URL (for own node / mempool API)
data.nostr_relays: Nostr relays for bot/client messaging (select from suggestions or add custom)
data.nostr_bot_nsec: Bot private key (NSEC or 64-char hex, empty = generate in next step)
data.nostr_bot_npub: Bot public key (NPUB, auto-derived from NSEC)
data.nostr_allowed_npubs: Allowed npubs whitelist (your app npub(s), one per line or comma-separated)
data.allow_continue_with_warning: Continue with warning (I understand the beta risk and my responsibility)

expert.title: Expert mode
expert.description: Use local hub URL and optionally prioritize ws://<host>:3334 relay proxy. To enable the Nostr bot without an existing key pair, leave 'Bot private key' empty — the next step will generate a key pair and display it to you. For own NPUB and local relay options, see: https://github.com/northpower25/ha-btc-alby-hub-integration/tree/HEAD/docs/handbook.en.md and https://github.com/northpower25/ha-btc-alby-hub-addon. Warning: beta software can fail or behave unexpectedly and could lead to financial loss. Do not test with large amounts.

nostr_keygen.title: Save your Nostr bot identity

data.keys_saved: I have copied and saved my Nostr bot identity (nsec + npub)

error.missing_wallet_pubkey: Missing wallet pubkey in NWC string.
error.missing_relay: Missing relay parameter in NWC string.
error.missing_secret: Missing secret parameter in NWC string.
error.warning_ack_required:
Required setup checks raised warnings. Enable 'Continue with warning' if you still want to continue.
{warnings}
error.keys_not_saved: You must confirm that you have saved your Nostr keys before continuing.

cloud.title: Update Cloud mode settings
cloud.description: Adjust your NWC connection string, price provider, currency or network provider. To regenerate the bot key pair, clear the 'Bot private key' field — the next step will generate and display a new pair. For own NPUB and local relay options, see handbook and add-on repo links in setup.

expert.title: Update Expert mode settings
expert.description: Adjust NWC connection, local hub URL, relay, price provider, currency or network provider. To regenerate the bot key pair, clear the 'Bot private key' field — the next step will generate and display a new pair. For own NPUB and local relay options, see handbook and add-on repo links in setup.
